'''ây-ch-dh''' ('''kayachadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codenature|codenature]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codenature|codenature]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-ch-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kayachadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyachadh|thiyachadh]] || [[word:jiyachadh|jiyachadh]] || [[word:shiyachadh|shiyachadh]] || [[word:kiyachadh|kiyachadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyachadh|thuthuyachadh]] || [[word:jujuyachadh|jujuyachadh]] || [[word:shushuyachadh|shushuyachadh]] || [[word:kukuyachadh|kukuyachadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyachadh|thuyachadh]] || [[word:juyachadh|juyachadh]] || [[word:shuyachadh|shuyachadh]] || [[word:kuyachadh|kuyachadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyachadh|thuyachadh]] || [[word:juyachadh|juyachadh]] || [[word:shuyachadh|shuyachadh]] || [[word:kuyachadh|kuyachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyachadh|theyachadh]] || [[word:jeyachadh|jeyachadh]] || [[word:sheyachadh|sheyachadh]] || [[word:keyachadh|keyachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyachadh|thothoyachadh]] || [[word:jojoyachadh|jojoyachadh]] || [[word:shoshoyachadh|shoshoyachadh]] || [[word:kokoyachadh|kokoyachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyachadh|thoyachadh]] || [[word:joyachadh|joyachadh]] || [[word:shoyachadh|shoyachadh]] || [[word:koyachadh|koyachadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyachadh|thoyachadh]] || [[word:joyachadh|joyachadh]] || [[word:shoyachadh|shoyachadh]] || [[word:koyachadh|koyachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyachadh|thĂŠyachadh]] || [[word:jĂŠyachadh|jĂŠyachadh]] || [[word:shĂŠyachadh|shĂŠyachadh]] || [[word:kĂŠyachadh|kĂŠyachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayachadh|thathayachadh]] || [[word:jajayachadh|jajayachadh]] || [[word:shashayachadh|shashayachadh]] || [[word:kakayachadh|kakayachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayachadh|thayachadh]] || [[word:jayachadh|jayachadh]] || [[word:shayachadh|shayachadh]] || [[word:kayachadh|kayachadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayachadh|thayachadh]] || [[word:jayachadh|jayachadh]] || [[word:shayachadh|shayachadh]] || [[word:kayachadh|kayachadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayachadh|shayachadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayachadh|goshayachadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayachadh|gokishayachadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayachadhnĂŒ|shayachadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayachadhnknĂŒ|goshayachadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayachadhnĂŒ|gokishayachadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayachadhshĂ«|shayachadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkshĂ«|goshayachadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayachadhshĂ«|gokishayachadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayachadhro|shayachadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkro|goshayachadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayachadhro|gokishayachadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayachadhmu|shayachadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkmu|goshayachadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayachadhmu|gokishayachadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayachadhsher|shayachadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayachadhnksher|goshayachadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayachadhsher|gokishayachadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayachadhng|shayachadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkng|goshayachadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayachadhng|gokishayachadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayachadhya|shayachadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkya|goshayachadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayachadhya|gokishayachadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayachadhyam|shayachadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkyam|goshayachadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayachadhyam|gokishayachadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayachadhnĂŒshĂ«|shayachadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayachadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayachadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayachadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayachadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayachadhnĂŒro|shayachadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayachadhnknĂŒro|goshayachadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayachadhnĂŒro|gokishayachadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayachadhnĂŒmu|shayachadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayachadhnknĂŒmu|goshayachadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayachadhnĂŒmu|gokishayachadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayachadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shayachadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayachadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayachadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayachadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayachadhshĂ«ro|shayachadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkshĂ«ro|goshayachadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayachadhshĂ«ro|gokishayachadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayachadhshĂ«mu|shayachadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkshĂ«mu|goshayachadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayachadhshĂ«mu|gokishayachadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayachadhronĂŒ|shayachadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkronĂŒ|goshayachadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayachadhronĂŒ|gokishayachadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayachadhroshĂ«|shayachadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkroshĂ«|goshayachadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayachadhroshĂ«|gokishayachadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayachadhromu|shayachadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkromu|goshayachadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayachadhromu|gokishayachadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayachadhmunĂŒ|shayachadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkmunĂŒ|goshayachadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayachadhmunĂŒ|gokishayachadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayachadhmushĂ«|shayachadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkmushĂ«|goshayachadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayachadhmushĂ«|gokishayachadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayachadhmuro|shayachadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayachadhnkmuro|goshayachadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayachadhmuro|gokishayachadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
